LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS LAVELLE ALDERSON AND CORALEE ALDERSON'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY COURT ACTION PENDING ARBITRATOR. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED.
